title: The Story of al-Suhari b. Shabib
description: According to Abu 'Ubaydah Ma'mar b. al-Miithanni: Al-Suhari b. Shabib came to Khilid (b. 'Abdallah) requesting a stipend. Khilid said, " What would the son of Shabib do with a stipend?" Therefore, In Shabib took his leave of him and departed. Khilid repented, fearing that he would cause an outbreak against him. Thus he sent a message to him, summoning him. Al-Suhari said, "I was at his place before." But the messengers refused to leave him alone, wherefore he drew his sword against them.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 25
